question_text: How many US states will have reported human cases of H5N1 by February 28, 2025?
resolution_criteria: The number of individual US states with reported human H5N1 cases as indicated on the official US dashboard as of February 28, 2025.
comparison_to_outcome: The underlying data suggested 15 states had reported cases on February 28th.
takeaways: Ambiguity arose due to overlapping buckets.
